sources.name: CAG Report No. 13 of 2023 – Bharatmala Phase 1 Performance Audit

_metadata.note: Ratings are indicative based on publicly available audit findings and completion records. Not official NHAI star ratings.

top_contractors_india.name: Larsen & Toubro Limited (L&T Infrastructure)
top_contractors_india.source: NHAI Annual Report 2022-23, L&T Annual Report 2023-24

top_contractors_india.name: KNR Constructions Limited
top_contractors_india.source: KNR Constructions Annual Report 2023-24, NHAI eTender

top_contractors_india.name: GR Infraprojects Limited
top_contractors_india.source: GR Infraprojects DRHP, NHAI Awarded Projects 2023

top_contractors_india.name: Dilip Buildcon Limited (DBL)
top_contractors_india.cag_findings: CAG noted time overruns in 3 of 5 sampled DBL projects under Bharatmala
top_contractors_india.source: CAG Audit Report 13/2023, DBL Annual Report 2023

top_contractors_india.name: Afcons Infrastructure Limited
notable_projects: NH in Northeast India – Arunachal Pradesh sections

top_contractors_india.name: PNC Infratech Limited
top_contractors_india.cag_findings: Slow pace of construction noted in UP projects; land acquisition delays contributed

flagged_contractors_cag.source: CAG Report No. 13 of 2023 – Bharatmala Performance Audit
flagged_contractors_cag.note: These are findings from the official CAG audit. Not blacklisted — flagged for delays/overruns.

findings.impact: Redesign costs and delays in 35% of sampled projects
findings.responsible: NHAI project planning division + awarded contractors

findings.impact: 60% of delayed projects cited land acquisition as primary bottleneck
findings.responsible: State governments + NHAI land acquisition units

findings.impact: CAG found overpayments in maintenance contracts across multiple NHs
15% of inspected road stretches showed premature distress within 2 years

contractor_types_explained.EPC: Engineering, Procurement & Construction – Government pays contractor directly
contractor_types_explained.BOT: Build-Operate-Transfer – Contractor funds, builds, operates toll, transfers back
contractor_types_explained.HAM: Hybrid Annuity Model – Government pays 40% upfront, 60% as annuity over 15 years
